commands.review_summary:
The branch adjusts subagent completion handoff for group/channel routes, updates Discord/Slack/QA-Lab/uninstall regression tests, and raises the CLI launcher Node floor to 22.19.

Reproducibility: yes. The PR body names focused Vitest and QA-Lab/Testbox commands for the failing broad-gate paths; I did not rerun them, so this is source/proof based rather than a fresh local reproduction.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer draft with cross-channel delivery behavior should stay in maintainer review for final current-main merge proof and release-gate rerun judgment.

target.title: fix(release): repair broad gate regressions
target.body:
## Summary

- Restore subagent completion handoff behavior for group/channel routes so completion replies go back through the requester agent with message-tool delivery, while preserving numeric thread ids.
- Align Discord/Slack visible-reply tests with the current automatic group default and keep explicit `message_tool` cases covered.
- Fix broad-gate test regressions: launcher Node floor now matches 22.19 runtime/package engines, uninstall peer fixture no longer creates a bogus non-symlink peer, and qa-lab mock `sessions_spawn` errors are only attributed to real `sessions_spawn` calls.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts src/agents/subagent-announce.format.e2e.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/uninstall.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor.tool-result.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts test/openclaw-launcher.e2e.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/providers/mock-openai/server.test.ts`
- Testbox `tbx_01krxc5dhr2jehpy1dvpzwvx4w`: `pnpm openclaw qa suite --provider-mode mock-openai --runtime-pair pi,codex --runtime-parity-tier standard --scenario thread-memory-isolation --output-dir .artifacts/qa-e2e/runtime-parity-thread-memory-fix`
- Testbox `tbx_01krxc5dhr2jehpy1dvpzwvx4w`: `CI=1 OPENCLAW_TESTBOX_REMOTE_RUN=1 pnpm check:changed`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Broad release/prerelease QA regressions found in remote sweep on `9536d66a355541df0a492f8c70a9fe8bb4ea37de`.

Real environment tested: Local focused Vitest in Codex worktree, plus Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01krxc5dhr2jehpy1dvpzwvx4w`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm check:changed` inside Testbox without recursive `OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1`, and targeted qa-lab runtime-pair scenario for `thread-memory-isolation`.

Evidence after fix: Focused local suites passed; targeted runtime-pair scenario exited 0; Testbox changed gate exited 0.

Observed result after fix: The previously failing subagent announce, launcher floor, Discord/Slack visible reply, plugin uninstall fixture, and qa-lab runtime parity mock-server paths are green on the patched branch.

What was not tested: Full release/prerelease workflows were not rerun on this draft PR yet; the original QA-Lab Matrix live media timeout remains classified as live/infra until rerun.
target.author: vincentkoc
